steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
To find $f(169)$, replace the input variable $x$ with $169$ in the definition of the function:
$$f(169)=6+\sqrt{169}$$

steps.title: Evaluate the radical
steps.content:
The square root is $13$ because $13^2=169$. Substitute that value and finish the arithmetic:
$$f(169)=6+13=19$$
This value is the output of the function at the requested input. The answer is 19.
